introSection: Ulat Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Jawa Timur Park 1 in Batu, East Java, Indonesia. It was built by Jinma Rides and opened in 2011.
fullText: Ulat Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Jawa Timur Park 1 in Batu, East Java, Indonesia. It was built by Jinma Rides and opened in 2011.
